purpose: Canonical catalog of raw playtest telemetry logged for solo and multiplayer balancing and post-run analysis.

reviewPolicy.defaultDeveloperQuestion: Do you expect to analyze or balance this feature later, and if so what raw inputs would you want to inspect?

entities.name: games
entities.rationale: Groups all player-day and customer telemetry under a single authoritative game id.

fields.name: gameId
fields.rationale: V1 game identifier shared across all telemetry rows.

fields.name: roomId
fields.rationale: Retains the public room code that produced the run.

fields.name: rngSeed
fields.rationale: Lets offline analysis correlate balancing outcomes with deterministic generation.

fields.name: gameMode
fields.rationale: Separates solo and multiplayer runs when comparing pacing, balance, and retention.

fields.name: playerCount
fields.rationale: Lets analysts segment runs by configured seat count as the game expands beyond the current 1-2 player UI.

fields.name: customerTastePreferenceWeight
fields.source: shared balance config at room creation
fields.rationale: Captures the exact global taste-weight multiplier used when converting persistent taste offsets into daily customer preference.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.rationale: Marks when the run was first recorded.

fields.name: lastActivityAt
fields.rationale: Marks the latest plan or next-day activity for the run.

entities.name: playerDayRecords
entities.source: authoritative room snapshots and submitted plans
entities.rationale: Captures raw per-day player inputs and resolved outcomes for balancing decisions.

fields.name: analyticsPlayerId
fields.rationale: Links the same anonymous browser across games without exposing player names.

fields.name: playerId
fields.rationale: Distinguishes each room-scoped participant.

fields.name: dayNumber
fields.rationale: Groups planning and result records by day.

fields.name: gameMode
fields.rationale: Lets submitted plans and day outcomes be compared between solo and multiplayer contexts.

fields.name: playerCount
fields.rationale: Explains customer-scaling context for each submitted plan and resolved day.

fields.name: factionId
fields.rationale: Supports balance analysis across stand identities.

fields.name: weather
fields.rationale: Explains market conditions for submitted plans.

fields.name: marketBasePrices
fields.rationale: Captures shared ingredient prices that influenced planning.

fields.name: inventoryBeforePlanning
fields.rationale: Shows the stock available before the new shopping list.

fields.name: moneyBeforePlanning
fields.rationale: Captures purchasing power before the submitted plan.

fields.name: reputationBeforePlanning
fields.rationale: Captures reputation influence before the submitted plan.

fields.name: purchases
fields.rationale: Stores the exact staged shopping basket.

fields.name: recipe
fields.rationale: Stores the recipe the player chose for the day.

fields.name: price
fields.rationale: Stores the selling price the player submitted.

fields.name: inventoryAfterResults
fields.rationale: Shows leftover stock after the day resolves.

fields.name: moneyAfterResults
fields.rationale: Shows ending cash after purchases and sales.

fields.name: reputationAfterResults
fields.rationale: Shows ending reputation after the day resolves.

fields.name: dailyResults
fields.rationale: Stores cups sold, revenue, satisfaction, reputation delta, and customer outcome counts.

entities.name: customerProfiles
entities.source: seeded customer roster at game start
entities.rationale: Captures stable taste offsets for each persistent customer in a run.

fields.name: customerId
fields.rationale: Stable game-scoped customer identifier.

fields.name: tasteOffsets
fields.rationale: Stores lemons, sugar, and ice preference offsets for balancing analysis.

entities.name: customerEvents
entities.rationale: Captures the final per-customer day outcome and why it happened.

fields.name: customerEventId
fields.rationale: Stable per-day event identifier.

fields.name: customerId
fields.rationale: Links the event back to the persistent customer profile.

fields.name: willingnessToPay
fields.rationale: Supports pricing analysis and buy/skip explanation.

fields.name: preferredRecipe
fields.rationale: Captures what the customer wanted that day.

fields.name: chosenPlayerId
fields.rationale: Shows which stand the customer targeted, if any.

fields.name: outcome
fields.rationale: Stores buy, skip, or soldOut.

fields.name: outcomeReason
fields.rationale: Stores purchased, purchased_after_sold_out_reroute, all_prices_above_willingness, selected_stand_sold_out, or reroute_exhausted_after_sold_out.

fields.name: rerouteCount
fields.rationale: Counts how many sold-out selections were exhausted before the customer reached the final outcome.

fields.name: salePrice
fields.rationale: Captures the actual charged price when a purchase succeeds.

fields.name: satisfaction
fields.rationale: Captures the resolved post-purchase satisfaction score.

entities.name: customerOfferScores
entities.source: telemetry scoring breakdown during winner selection
entities.rationale: Captures the raw per-player offer inputs that explain why a customer chose, rejected, or lost a stand.

fields.name: customerEventId
fields.rationale: Associates each offer row with one customer event.

fields.name: selectionRound
fields.rationale: Distinguishes the initial stand selection from later reroute rounds for the same customer event.

fields.name: playerId
fields.rationale: Identifies the stand being scored.

fields.name: offeredPrice
fields.rationale: Supports pricing comparisons across stands.

fields.name: reputation
fields.rationale: Shows the reputation value used during scoring.

fields.name: preferredRecipeFit
fields.rationale: Shows how well the stand recipe matched the customer preference.

fields.name: priceScore
fields.rationale: Shows whether the customer would even consider the offered price.

fields.name: historyBonus
fields.rationale: Shows repeat-customer pull from prior satisfaction and recency.

fields.name: totalScore
fields.rationale: Captures the final weighted score used for stand selection.

fields.name: canFulfill
fields.rationale: Shows whether the stand had enough stock to serve the customer.

fields.name: offerResult
fields.rationale: Stores selected, not_selected, price_rejected, or selected_but_sold_out for each selection round.
